title: ECDSA
description: ECDSA is the legacy Bitcoin signature algorithm used by pre-Taproot outputs and many wallets. Understanding its nonce and inverse terms explains key leak risks and malleability-era constraints.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Keys and Addresses
resources.notes: Walkthrough of ECDSA signing and verification flow.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Transaction-level context where signatures authorize spends.
